base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of merchant_idle — a character (npc) from 1986 legend of zelda. Merchant — cave shopkeeper. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
